execution_rules.notes: P4-T3 lands to main + git push per operator instruction; CI must be green first

hard_constraints: MCP server must import the same modules that write .coderef/ artifacts (no second implementation - the coderef-context Python server died of schema drift)
Tool responses must be compact pre-summarized JSON, never raw graph.json dumps
Operator instruction: commit all to main and push (integrator lane)

decisions_log.note: branched from wo/rag-header-coverage-enforce-and-surface-001 (6 commits ahead of main, this WO depends on its 12-field report); pre-existing uncommitted ARCHIVED deletions left unstaged
artifact deletions (9 tracked files) + roadmap.json/md staged in fixup after atomic git-rm pathspec failure (nul untracked) dropped them from de17dcd

registry bloat CHECK measured: 118MB, 98% = per-element duplication of file-grain rawFacts (projections.ts L148) + pretty-print inflation. Sharding NOT the right fix; filed STUB-BQDXJ0 (rawFacts dedup design) per the otherwise-file-stub clause
one full-suite run had 1 transient failure that did not reproduce in two subsequent clean runs (1588/0 both); not traced to P2 edits
@modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1.29.0 installed with --legacy-peer-deps: openai@4 peerOptional zod@^3 conflicts with project zod@4 (pre-existing tension); SDK itself accepts zod 3||4
resolveNodes: file-path queries resolve to ALL elements of the file (byFile mode, not ambiguity-refused) so impact_of/what_calls aggregate file-level
thin wrappers are pointers, no wrapper edits needed; ASSISTANT repo commit pending Phase 4 landing

decisions_log.summary: Docs pass while dogfood runs: CLI.md rag-index/rag-search tables were badly drifted (documented --dir/--chroma-url/--model/--query/--threshold which do not exist; --constraint marked deferred but shipped) — rewrote both to actual flag surface, added coderef-mcp-server section + overview row. README rebuild-status bullets updated (11-field -> 12-field ValidationReport drift fix, local-first + MCP bullets). CHANGELOG dated entry added. rag-index printHelp gap fixed: --coverage-floor/--strict-coverage existed in parseArgs but not help; stale ollama-when-implemented example fixed. Also live stdio smoke test of dist MCP server: initialize + tools/list + codebase_summary + what_calls all correct (serverInfo coderef-core v1.0.0, 6 tools, real artifact data, graceful element_not_found).

Second docs pass (operator-requested while dogfood runs): 11-field -> 12-field ValidationReport sweep across SCHEMA.md (interface + header_coverage_pct entry + baseline table refreshed to committed 2026-05-31 report), ARCHITECTURE.md (3 spots), API.md (3 spots), AGENT-CONTRACT.md (header + JSON example + IndexingResult coverage-gate bullets + headerless provenance note + new prefer-MCP-tools section), CLI.md (chokepoint line + failed-status row + rag-status section rewritten to real flags -p/--project-dir,-j/--json). SCHEMA.md section 6 gains coverageGateRefused/coverageWarning additive fields + include-headerless paragraph. AGENTS.md and rag-http-api.md verified clean (latter is deliberately ollama-only). Verified rag-status + coderef-mcp-server bin names against package.json.

P2-T4 dogfood evidence via operator-approved parallel scoped run: full-repo dogfood measured at ~8s/KB CPU embedding (1KB probe 7.9s, 4KB probe 34s x2) -> ~5h total, ~36% done at 105min; killing loses buffered progress. Operator chose parallel scoped run. Fixture: 3 src files -> populate minimal (12-field report, header_coverage_pct=100) -> rag-index with OPENAI_API_KEY stripped, no --provider: provider=ollama (key-aware default PROVEN), status=success, chunksIndexed=49/49, skipped=0, failed=0, includeHeaderless=false default preserved, EXIT=0. Evidence: scoped-dogfood-result.json. Full-repo run (PID 18040) left running; completion ~12:00-12:30 local as supplementary evidence. Scoped-run throughput 6.2s/chunk independently confirms ETA. Note: populate on out-of-tree project requires ASSISTANT/STANDARDS/layers.json discoverable by upward walk - satisfied via temp copy.

Test gate under ollama contention (full-repo dogfood saturating ~6 cores): full-suite run1 5 files/7 tests failed incl. an explicit <100ms perf assertion measuring 131ms; run2 failed ONLY scanner-export (different set -> non-deterministic -> contention, not regression). Isolated rerun of all three victim files (scanner-export, populate-cli, ast-extractor) 40/40 PASS even under ollama load. Suite totals 1635 tests incl. 17 MCP server tests; 1598-1600 pass in full runs with only contention victims failing. Gate accepted as PASS-with-contention-note per prior flaky_test_note precedent; optional clean full run post-dogfood as supplementary.

Kaizen step attempted; kaizen-log runner FAILS with registry-db IntegrityError (kaizen_entries.status NOT NULL — runner omits status field; exit 3). Three intended entries recorded here instead: (1) observability/rag-index: buffers ALL output until exit, no per-chunk progress signal — 5h run indistinguishable from hang without CPU probes; (2) performance/rag-index: CPU ollama embedding ~8s/KB, full-repo ~5h vs 40-80min envelope, scoped-fixture dogfood proved provider default in 5min — prefer scoped evidence runs; (3) correctness/populate-coderef: out-of-tree project dirs fail on ASSISTANT/STANDARDS/layers.json upward-walk — needs env/flag override. Plus the kaizen-log bug itself (correctness/kaizen-log) — candidate stub for SKILLS domain.

Supplementary full-repo dogfood COMPLETED (operator believed it was killed mid-run, but the buffered result flushed at exit — createdAt 2026-06-12T20:56:22Z, processingTimeMs 34,977,182 ≈ 9.7h, confirming the buffers-until-exit kaizen note). Result: success=true, provider=ollama (key-aware default confirmed at full-repo scale), store=sqlite (persisted at .coderef/coderef-vectors.json per sqlite-store legacy path, 63.8MB; manifest .coderef/rag-index.json), chunksIndexed=2795, chunksFailed=0, chunksSkipped=22 (all header_status_partial in utils/fs.{ts,js} — DR-PHASE-7-E default preserved, includeHeaderless=false), headerCoveragePct=99.24, both gates passed. status=partial due to 17 converting-stage ENOENT errors on root-level types.d.ts and scanner.js — ghost entries in index.json for files that do not exist on disk (stale-index artifact, candidate cleanup item; matches the membership/staleness theme in the unresolved-edge audit). Full output archived at coderef/workorder/coderef-core-mcp-server-and-intelligence-fixes/full-dogfood-result.json. Rides with /close-workorder commit alongside NOTE-KAIZEN.
